title: Xenon Racer

notes: Works out of the box on Ubuntu MATE 18.04.2 LTS and Logitech F710 is detected properly. Total play time of 2 hours. Also supports 21:9 aspect ratio. See game play video here --> https://www.youtube.com/watch?v=WMbgWkGZNSM
title: Xenon Racer

notes: Works out of the box on Ubuntu MATE 18.04.2 LTS and Logitech F710 is detected properly. Played for 2 hours, no crashes. See game play video here --> https://www.youtube.com/watch?v=WMbgWkGZNSM
title: Xenon Racer

notes:
i'm not overly comfortable giving this a "platinum" rating, however disregarding a slight dip in expected performance (within expectations i'd say though, never seen it on windows to compare) and that it won't use my g27 steering wheel (combined pedals, steering won't actually work)
it does seem to run fine, I was surprised to see i had to dip a few settings below the normal, but the overall video quality was not actually bad. ran happily after settings adjustments. 
I Think this game is viable of whitelisting at a glance, all problems are game related, not some proton/steam misbehaviour.
although i "played for less then a hour". I did actually do a few races, messed with the customisations etc... no indications of any faults.
title: Xenon Racer

notes: Works out of the box and runs good at 1440p using an Radeon RX 580 8GB. See game play video here --> https://youtu.be/jHjc4KT3Lnk?t=35
